---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, or links that help explain the idea.
